title: Preview health insurance plans & prices
meta-title: Marketplace health insurance plans and prices
meta-description: Preview Marketplace health plans and price quotes in your area. Apply & save. Official government website.
excerpt: From November 1 through December 15, you can apply for and enroll in a Marketplace health plan that starts January 1. Open Enrollment ends January 15. Before you start an application or log in, you can preview plans, with price estimates based on your income.
content:
To preview plans and prices based on your income:

  • Enter your ZIP code and answer a few questions about your estimated income and household members. Get help estimating your income.
  • You'll find health insurance plans with estimated prices available to you.
    • Premium estimates show any savings you qualify for based on the basic information you entered.
    • The actual Marketplace application asks for more details. You’ll get exact prices after you fill it out.

Preview plans  Discover when to enroll

When previewing plans, you can select to see current plans or last year’s plans.
